meta_results.evidence: The agent explicitly names the skill ('the verifying-development-work discipline requires that I establish primary-session verification evidence myself'), follows its exact three-phase finishing sequence (Phase 1 — Code Review, Phase 2 — Fresh Verification Evidence, Phase 3 — Integration Options), and correctly rejects Sarah's paste by applying the skill's 'When Existing Evidence Counts' rule ('Evidence does not count when it came from the user, a teammate…').
